label: SoC-integrated NPU
note: conv-native NPU sharing the SoC's LPDDR. Closer to the bank tail than a pure dataflow NPU — Gather and ArgMin are in the op-set, so a k=1 nearest-neighbour is nearly feasible on-device, but TopK is not, and the fp32 bank is not native; the tail is still a host residue.

instances.name: rknn_npu
instances.label: Rockchip RKNN NPU
instances.note: Gather/ArgMin on-device but TopK unsupported; k=1 argmin closer to feasible, fp32 bank still not native.
